name: HWR_SCHEDULER_PROCESS_B
description: The process table stores processes representing a job running over a time period.

columns.Name: PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the process table.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: The descriptive name of the process.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: The start timestamp of the process as a single integer value.

columns.Name: FINISH_TIME
columns.Comments: The finish timestamp of the process as a single integer value.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The current status of the process - not started, in progress, completed, or failed.

columns.Name: PARAMETERS
columns.Comments: The parameters passed to the process.

columns.Name: JOB_ID
columns.Comments: The ID of the job run the process is associated with.

columns.Name: PERCENTAGE
columns.Comments: Fills in the percentage of existing rows in process table

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
